body.para:
Note: When an item has a matching GitHub ticket, the ticket number is behind the item in parentheses prefixed with #. You can find these tickets by going to:
https://github.com/X-Sharp/XSharpPublic/issues/nnn , where nnn is the ticket number.
If you find an issue in X#, we recommend that you report it on GitHub. You will be notified of the progress on the work on your issue

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Added code to check for the new [FoxArrayResultAttribute] that marks VFP functions which may create an array as a result (such as AMembers(), APrinters() and AUsed()).
When the function is called with an undeclared variable then a new private variable is created for the result. (

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed overload resolution when a Clipper calling convention function is called with a single NULL_OBJECT argument (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Prevented an assertion error when compiling in debug mode for functions with the NeedsAccessToLocal attribute and a VOID return type (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed an issue with cref attributes that are read from include files

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Late bound code now gives precedence to the NEW method over INIT (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed an issue where assigning to a hidden field or property was incorrectly allowed. Added NoIVarGetSelf() and NoIVarPutSelf() methods (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed a macro compiler issue with certain method calls (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed an issue with Memo functions

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed ADel() to correctly remove the element at the specified position

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Added the Transform @N format function

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: XPP Dialect: Added NLS_ defines and initial implementation for the SetLocale() function

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: XPP Dialect: Fixed a late binding issue (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed VARTYPE() throwing exceptions for undeclared variables (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added SET POINT and SET SEPARATOR support (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed SET DEFAULT TO command paths and working directory handling (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Implemented Lock(), RLock(), FLock() and UnLock() for SQLRDD (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: VFP GUI provider now loads dynamically via AssemblyHelper (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed RELEASE ALL LIKE when quoted patterns are passed in the skeleton (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added missing parameterless and IntPtr overloads for F* file functions (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed SET MEMOWIDTH, SYSMETRIC and COPY TO ARRAY (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Refined SET('DEFAULT') and SET('DIRECTORY') (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Implemented FCHSIZE() and VFP-compatible BINTOC() / CTOBIN() (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed SYSMETRIC() calls, SET MEMOWIDTH typo, and SET DEFAULT/DIRECTORY initialization issues at startup (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed MemoHelpers.MAX_WIDTH to be a dynamic property (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Implemented GETDIR(), GETFILE() and GETPICT() dialog functions (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed MESSAGEBOX() timeout issue and implemented dynamic parameter handling (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Implemented DIR/DIRECTORY command with output parity to VFP (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added [FoxArrayInputParameterAttribute] and an array result stack to support functions such as AMembers(), APrinters() and AUsed()

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Implemented SET DEVICE TO FILE redirection (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Adjusted AMembers() and APrinters() to use the new array result mechanism

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed FDate() to accept a filename parameter and return the actual last-write date of the file (

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed FTime() to accept a filename parameter and return the actual last-write time of the file (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed FSize() VFP compatibility: when SET COMPATIBLE is ON and no work area is specified, it returns the size of the named file; when the filename has no extension, a .DBF extension is assumed (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added new file functions FName() (returns the filename from a path) and FAttrib() (returns file attributes) (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added the [NeedsAccessToLocals] attribute to VFP Macro Wrapper functions to preserve correct macro evaluation behavior (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Implemented NORMALIZE() and DISPLAYPATH() functions (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added support for the SET BELL TO command (the command is accepted and ignored, matching VFP behavior) (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed RELEASE ALL LIKE when a quoted pattern is used in the skeleton (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Fixed Set.Compatible default return value: it was incorrectly returning string "OFF" instead of LOGIC FALSE

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: VFP Dialect: Added Set.Compatible handler in the Set() function, supporting both string values ("ON", "OFF", "DB4") and LOGIC values

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed a memo-related state issue (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Updated documentation for the Mb..() functions (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Removed duplicate MAKELANGID() and MAKELCID() functions from the Win32APILibrary; they were already defined in another location (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Added dummy stub implementations for Nation Functions in XSharp.VO (

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Additional fix for DBF Header locking in FoxPro format tables (

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed issue where the project system was incorrectly responding to the PackageReferences project dependency. This caused the first Build in Visual Studio to freeze.(

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Moved logging and most VS event handlers to a new Support DLL. Fixed an issue in the IDE BuildLogger (

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Added option to edit a project file without unloading it. Saving the changes will trigger reloading of the project (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: ProjectReferences in SDK projects no longer store the name, guid etc.

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Added the missing Chinese XML documentation file to the XSharp.VO NuGet package

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Changed the UDC for the RECALL command, because FoxPro temporarily switches of the SetDeleted() setting during the command (

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Added an implementation of the AUsed() function (VFP)

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fix a problem with the DBF cache when the same table is opened in 2 different workareas with a file name that only differs in case (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fix a problem with the DBF Header locking for FoxPro tables with autonumber fields (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: The DBFVFP driver now allows index expressions that contain Trim(), Ltrim(), RTrim() etc. (

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: The implementation of several UI related functions, such as MessageBox(), have been moved from XSharp.VFP to XSharp.VFP.UI.
These functions will now output to the console window when XSharp.VFP.UI cannot be found.

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: The XSharp.VFP assembly now contains function definitions for all functions from VFP, even the ones that exist in XSharp.Core and XSharp.RT. These functions will delegate the work to the implementation in the other assemblies.

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Fixed an issue in the Macrocompiler for .Net 8

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: We have now also included VOConsoleClasses.dll, VOSystemClasses.dll and VORDDCLasses.dll for .Net 8

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: The NuGet packages for the X# runtime now also contain the Chinese XML files.(

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: We have added implicit conversion operators from USUAL to nullable value types(

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Methods named FIELDGET and FIELDPUT (in uppercase) are now named FieldGet and FieldPut to be compatible with the case of other methods.

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: The Build task to compile native resources now checks the rc and include files for Byte Order Marks (BOM). When it finds such a BOM then it generates a warning

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Warning numbers for the Native Resource generation task now start with XS9xxx and no longer with MSB…

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: For SDK projects File Foo.xh is now by default depending on Foo.prg when they both appear in the same folder

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: Fixed an issue where the first Build inside VS with a solution that has X# projects would seem to freeze VS. After pressing Cancel a second Build (or Rebuild) would work.

The “ToggleComment” command now takes the comment status of the first line of a block of lines to decide if the block needs to be commented or uncommented. When a line inside a block is already commented then it may end up being double commented after a comment operation. And when a block containing a double commented line is uncommented, than that line will become single commented afterwards.
We no longer add ProjectGuid properties to SDK projects. Guids are also removed from project references inside SDK projects.(#1819)
Fixed an issue with duplicate reference names in the Solution Explorer window (#1816)
When a project has multiple project references to the same external project, then problems could occur. This has been fixed. The second reference gets (silently) ignored.
The IDE has been prepared for a menu option to convert a traditional project to the new SDK project file format.( #1823). The menu option is not working yet.
Sometimes VS would free when adding an assembly reference. This has been fixed (#1814)
The document formatter now excludes lines that are part of a TEXT ... ENDTEXT

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-24px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:24px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
li.text: Adjust target OS for SDK style templates and old templates. Old templates are Windows only. SDK templates are also Linux, Android and MacOS when possible

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: This build contains some bug fixes and new features compared to 3.0.0.0

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: The compiler now automatically generates a __XSHARP3__ define
Fixed an “Failed to emit module” error when the code contains an expression in the form of “UnnamedType.Property” or “UnnamedType.Method()” when the “allowdot” compiler option is enabled.
The range expression rule in the compiler ( a .. b) allowed both sides of the dots to be empty. This has been fixed. The compiler now supports “a .. b”, “a .. “ and “ .. b”

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: Fixed an error reported by Stefan Hirsch, was caused by automatically adding an OSPlatformAttribute to the output assemblies
Fixed a NuGet error about listing “win-x86” as runtime identifier for Old style projects with package references (#1801)

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li:
The Output window in Visual Studio was not always showing progress.
This has been fixed (reported by Trevor)
The Build/Cancel button was not visible when a X# project was selected and another project was being built. (#1799)

The include-files node could sometimes show files, even after the /nostddef compiler option was selected on the project properties page. We recommend a touch of all the files in a project to completely refresh (clear) the include list. (#1805)
Fixed an error “the type initializer for 'XSharp.Project.ErrorListManager' threw an exception” when loading projects in VS2026 (#1800)
The language service now respects GLOBAL USING
Updated the Windows Forms and WPF SDK templates
The assemblies that are automatically added for SDK projects now show more properties inside the property windows.
Improved load speed for SDK projects..

body.para: XSharp 3 is a MAJOR update from XSharp 2. All elements of the product have been touched during the last couple of months. X# 3 has some breaking changes, so you should take the time to recompile and test all your existing projects and solutions.

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li:
The compiler no longer supports "Bring Your Own Runtime". If you want to compile in the VO or Vulcan dialect you will HAVE to include references to XSharp.Core and XSharp.RT.
That does not mean that you can't link your program against the Vulcan runtime DLLs, but we no longer map our Xbase types to the types in these DLLs. So USUAL will not be mapped to Vulcan.__Usual. You can still use the types, functions and classes on these DLLs, but they will no longer be treated specially. If you want to call a function from the Vulcan Runtime yuou will have to use the syntax for static methods

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: The signature for several functions and methods in the XSharp Runtime has been changed. We have used the new IN keyword for many that use parameters defined AS USUAL. The new IN USUAL tells the compiler to pass the variable by reference, which should make the code slightly faster. It also tells the compiler that the parameter will not be changed by the code in the function / method
We have also moved several functions and types between Runtime DLLs, because they were not in the best possible location.
X# 3 comes with runtime DLLs for both .net 46 and .net 8. Not all VOSDK Dlls have been ported to .Net 8 because they contain code that does not work in an AnyCPU environment.

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: GLOBAL USING
File wide NAMESPACE
RECORD modifier for classes and structures
Added a new __XSHARP3__ define which is always true, so you can conditional compile differences between XSharp 3 and a previous version

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: The Build system now supports the new SDK style projects

We have added a task to generate source code for GLOBAL USING values declared in the project files. Please note that the VS integration does not have a page to declare the GLOBAL USING values for a project. That will follow.
The XAML files in the Rules subfolder of the MsBuild folder are no longer used and have been deleted. Also the references to these files in the .props and .targets files have been removed
The builds system no longer automarically picks up the include folder from your Vulcan installation

There are many changes in the .props and .targets files to support SDK style projects and .Net 10. One of these changes automatically sets dependency relations between files, such as between VOBinary files and the module that they belong to.

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: We are now including .Net 8 versions of most of our runtime DLLs.
The Runtime is now delivered in both DLL format as well as Nuget Packages. See the separate topic about the Runtime in this help file for a description of these packages and DLLs
Several functions in the FoxPro Runtime have been added
The record number in RDD operations is now a DWORD and no longer a LONG. The maximum record number in a DBF file is now 2^32 - 1

list.style: font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: We are now supporting SDK style projects. To do so many changes were made all over the Visual Studio support code
We are now fully supporting Visual Studio 2026

li.text: We are no longer supporting Visual Studio 2017.

list.li: We are still supporting Visual Studio 2019 but no new features will be implemented for this version of VS.
